annotation_target.structure: Post-recapitulation consequent — gentle harmonic resolution, approaching coda
teaching_goals: feel the piece settling toward its final rest
each harmonic resolution is a step toward stillness
style_tips: slight decrescendo — the dreaming is fading

teaching_notes.note: The harmonic resolution — let it settle without rushing.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 29–32 of Traumerei (Dreaming) from Kinderszenen (continuation of mm. 25–28), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 29–32 and describe the continuation.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 29–32.
Measures 29–32 continue the approach toward the coda — Schumann sustains the dreaming quality. The harmonic motion is gentle and resolving. Let me loop mm. 29–32.
Schumann Traumerei mm. 29–32: coda approach continuation, gentle harmonic resolution. Pairs with mm. 25–28.
